title: 最近流行りのブティックで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for lending me your English textbook,
Chiyo. I really have to stop sleeping past my
alarm. I keep forgetting things.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's no problem. You're always helping me out
too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I feel like I'm asking way more from you
than you do from me. I had to borrow something
from you just the other day too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I've really gotta get it together.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oops, it's time for the next class... Sigh. Well, see you later.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! See you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ahh! Oh, Trainer, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So, um... you know how City has a job on top of
everything?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's been having trouble getting up in the
morning because her days are so busy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She seems even more tired than usual lately, and
I'm a little worried about her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: If only there were something I could do to help...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I understand Sakura Chiyono O's feelings, but there's not much she can do about Gold City's work. Although... if there's one thing she can do...
choice_data_list:
How about you get her a present to cheer her
up?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A present... Ooh, that's a good idea! But what
should I get her?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know! Just the other day, I saw some fresh duds
that can make anyone feel totally radical!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There was this dress that would be perfect for
dancing! Oh, and a really smart and
mature-looking suit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't think either would suit me, but I'm positive
a model like City can pull off both looks without
a hitch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see how excited she is, but it won't do for
her to spend all her money getting both outfits. I
should help her narrow down her gift options.
choice_data_list: You should get her the dress.
You should get her the suit.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Just the dress?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that makes sense! It's not her birthday or
anything, so it'd be weird to randomly give her so
many gifts. Haha!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll follow your suggestion and give it to her
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I spot Sakura Chiyono O giving
Gold City her gift. She really wastes no time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I had no idea you were so worried about me.
Thanks for this. Can I open it now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City reaches into the paper bag and pulls
out...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Is this a bodycon dress?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yep! My role model told me all about bodycon
dresses!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they're perfect for dancing in, and
wearing one is sure to get anyone feeling super
fly!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh... "super fly"?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Super fly and totally radical!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Ahaha! You know what, thanks. This really
cheered me up.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Really? That's great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I see Sakura Chiyono O reporting
everything to her role model, Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So I should get just the suit?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea. It's not her birthday or
anything, so it'd be weird to randomly give her so
many gifts, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll go buy it today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Chiyo. I got the present and letter you put on the
doorknob for me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Really?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry for worrying you. Thank you. And...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh. Sorry. The gift you got me is just so like you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A power suit with extra-large shoulder pads, huh?
I love it. Just looking at it cheers me up, and the
matcha green color you chose is really cute.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's great to hear! My role model was the one
who told me that matcha green is a really popular
color right now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She also told me you should wear it when you
want to make an impression, 'cause it'll make you
feel super fly and totally radical!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Then maybe I'll wear it to my next
interview.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following month, Gold City wears her suit
with the prominent shoulder padding on TV, and
it stirs up quite a buzz.
